Description: AI Monitoring Data Persistence — Replace in-memory singleton monitoring data (driftDetector, latencyMonitor, hallucinationChecker, roiTracker) with DB-backed persistence via new AIMonitoringEvent model. KPIs: Coverage >90%, Flush latency <100ms, Multi-process data visible
